description: Acquisition financing for a 220-unit rent-stabilized multifamily portfolio across four buildings in Central Brooklyn. Structured as a non-recourse floating-rate bridge loan with a 36-month term and two six-month extension options.

Joint venture equity raise for a ground-up mixed-use development in West Midtown. Sourced an institutional equity partner from LTG's family office network. GP/LP structure with a 20% promote above an 8% preferred return.

Bridge loan for a Class B office-to-residential conversion. 24-month term with one 12-month extension. Non-recourse with a completion guarantee. Placed with a debt fund lender specializing in NYC conversion assets.

Preferred equity tranche for a 185-unit multifamily recapitalization. Structured co-terminous with the senior debt at 12.5% current pay. Allowed the sponsor to extract equity without a full refinance.

Ground-up construction financing for a 210-unit multifamily development under the Affordable New York program. 30-month construction term with a mini-perm. Placed with a regional bank active on 421a-eligible projects.
Mezzanine loan behind a senior construction facility for an industrial-to-logistics conversion. 18-month term. Placed with a family office lender active in NYC industrial. Combined LTC of 83%.
